Your Day 1 Action Step

Do This Before You Close the Tab

Pick one path. Just one. The one that made you think "wait… I could actually do that."

Open your phone notes. Type it out. That's it.

Dropping Tomorrow

Day 2: Stop Guessing. Answer 5 Questions.

Most people pick a path based on vibes. Then they waste 3 months figuring out it doesn't fit their life.
